en: Let me spray. Buttercup is marrying Humperdinck in a little less than half an hour, so all we have to
ko: 요약하자면, 버터컵은 30분도 안 되어 험퍼딘크와 결혼해.

en: do is get in, break up the wedding, steal the princess, make our escape, after I kill Count Rogan.
That doesn't mean much time for dilly-dallying. You just wiggle your finger.
That's wonderful. I've always been a quick eater. What are our liabilities?
There is but one work in Kesselgate. Come here.
I need to go out and buy 60 men. And their assets?
Your brains. If there's a strength, I steal.
ko: 네 두뇌. 힘이 있다면, 난 훔칠 거야.

en: That's it? Impossible. If I had a month to plan, maybe I could come up with something but this.
You just shook your head. That doesn't make you happy?
My brains, his steel, and your strength against 60 men, and you think a little head-jiggle
ko: 내 두뇌, 그의 강철, 그리고 너의 힘으로 60명의 남자와 맞서고,

en: is supposed to make me happy? Hmm?
ko: 그리고 네가 조금 고개를 흔드는 게 나를 행복하게 해줄 거라고 생각해?

en: I mean, if we only had a wheelbarrow, that would be something.
ko: 만약 우리가 손수레만 있다면, 그건 뭔가가 될 텐데.

en: What? Where do we put that wheelbarrow, the albino head?
ko: 그 손수레는 어디에 두지? 머리 없이?
